title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Dice Horde**
*2026*
Roll & Write meets Tower Defense!
![Dice Horde](toplist_images/bgg_8c0b2d83.jpg)

2. **Concordia**
*2013*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia](toplist_images/bgg_6f4743ec.jpg)

3. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](toplist_images/bgg_e1c4ec22.jpg)

4. **Limit**
*2025*
Lead your nation in the world system.
![Limit](toplist_images/bgg_65b7ae43.jpg)

5. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](toplist_images/bgg_606f1604.jpg)

6. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](toplist_images/bgg_2277dcf0.png)

7. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](toplist_images/bgg_7e3c9073.png)

8. **Labyrinth: Chronicles**
*2026*
New take on the all-time classic. Explore the 3D Labyrinth, and help the villagers!
![Labyrinth: Chronicles](toplist_images/bgg_58d6ba4a.png)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_ed3633d6.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_8838a7c6.png)

11. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](toplist_images/bgg_3009cc8d.jpg)

12. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2026*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](toplist_images/bgg_3f975a4a.jpg)

13. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](toplist_images/bgg_6d43505e.png)

14. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_e770c3c3.jpg)

15. **Defenders of the Wild**
*2024*
Cooperate with other animal factions against the machine invasion.
![Defenders of the Wild](toplist_images/bgg_96cbe58c.jpg)

16. **Sanibel**
*2026*
Collect seashells that come and go with the tide on the beaches of Sanibel.
![Sanibel](toplist_images/bgg_803e79df.jpg)

17. **Almighty**
*2027*
Perform mighty acts upon hapless mortals to earn belief and glory.
![Almighty](toplist_images/bgg_da1f612b.png)

18. **Puerto Rico 1897: Special Edition**
*2025*
Manage a local farm, construct buildings, and trade goods in Puerto Rico. 
![Puerto Rico 1897: Special Edition](toplist_images/bgg_1f8f7ffa.jpg)

19. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](toplist_images/bgg_3839053b.png)

20. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](toplist_images/bgg_b5d6a1cd.jpg)

21. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](toplist_images/bgg_ecfc41d5.png)

22. **Heat: Rocky Roads**
*2026*
Get ready to race in Germany and South Africa.
![Heat: Rocky Roads](toplist_images/bgg_6c2c2f0c.jpg)

23. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](toplist_images/bgg_804ec3e9.png)

24. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](toplist_images/bgg_a6001066.jpg)

25. **High Frontier 4 All**
*2020*
Use real rocket science in a race to industrialize the solar system.
![High Frontier 4 All](toplist_images/bgg_1207be97.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*14 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](toplist_images/bgg_0735df99.jpg)

2. **Wingspan**
*86 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](toplist_images/bgg_3c56780e.jpg)

3. **Harmonies**
*22 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](toplist_images/bgg_5fa27a02.png)

4. **Castle Combo**
*17 months on the list*
Combine Medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](toplist_images/bgg_4231d7a7.png)

5. **Ark Nova**
*50 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_dcce83ad.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*10 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](toplist_images/bgg_93abc973.png)

7. **Azul**
*100 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](toplist_images/bgg_67736528.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*113 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](toplist_images/bgg_0fc6706c.jpg)

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*39 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_43dc32a7.png)

10. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*62 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](toplist_images/bgg_e2c47385.jpg)

11. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*32 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](toplist_images/bgg_8a452dc3.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*29 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](toplist_images/bgg_605c8deb.jpg)

13. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*15 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_efedaea2.jpg)

14. **Cascadia**
*55 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](toplist_images/bgg_66d6577f.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*29 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](toplist_images/bgg_ce5609ec.jpg)

16. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*8 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](toplist_images/bgg_4ac3dae6.png)

17. **Faraway**
*22 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](toplist_images/bgg_299e96d0.png)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*1 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](toplist_images/bgg_14931dc2.png)

19. **The Gang**
*8 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](toplist_images/bgg_daa5bd9d.jpg)

20. **Carcassonne**
*272 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](toplist_images/bgg_23e2502e.jpg)

21. **Toy Battle**
*1 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](toplist_images/bgg_e6a99380.jpg)

22. **The White Castle**
*28 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](toplist_images/bgg_9005f917.jpg)

23. **Splendor**
*142 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](toplist_images/bgg_d566f979.png)

24. **Take Time**
*3 months on the list*
Time beckons you to discover a multitude of challenging universes.
![Take Time](toplist_images/bgg_54fe41da.png)

25. **Agent Avenue**
*2 months on the list*
Retired spies in a suburban neighborhood race to discover each other's secrets.
![Agent Avenue](toplist_images/bgg_afa59e52.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com
